query: DELETE FROM web_crawl_results WHERE scanId IN (SELECT id FROM domain_intel_scans WHERE primaryDomain REGEXP '^(enterprise|msp|saas|paas|iaas|mixed_hosting|other)-[0-9]{10,}');
